## edu-cli phase-plan remove-chapter

Remove a chapter from a phase plan (从阶段性计划移除章节)

```
edu-cli phase-plan remove-chapter [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --chapter-id uint      Chapter ID (required)
  -h, --help                 help for remove-chapter
      --phase-plan-id uint   Phase plan ID (required)
```
